subject: refactor(layouts-nav): migrate layouts + nav chrome to DaisyUI
body:
- AuthLayout: bg-base-200 page surface.
- AppLayout: bg-base-200 page + bg-base-100 header with border-base-300.
  All page-top banners (auth-bypass warning, update-available, offline-
  ready, PWA install) are now `alert alert-{variant} rounded-none` so
  they span edge-to-edge. Sign-out button is `btn btn-ghost btn-circle`
  on mobile, sized ghost button on desktop. Logo link is a `btn btn-ghost`
  to get DaisyUI's tap feedback.
- Breadcrumbs: text uses `text-base-content/60` hierarchy; hover lifts to
  `bg-base-200` via hover: utility (DaisyUI tokens pickup theme automatically).
- NotificationBell: button becomes `btn btn-ghost btn-circle`; unread count
  uses `indicator` + `indicator-item badge badge-error badge-xs`. List
  items use hover:bg-base-200; unread rows tint `bg-info/10`. Delete
  button is `btn btn-ghost btn-sm btn-square hover:text-error`.
- PwaInstallPrompt: `alert alert-neutral rounded-none` surface with
  `btn btn-sm` install / instructions buttons and `btn btn-ghost btn-sm
  btn-circle` dismiss.
- InstallInstructionsModal: step numerals swap from slate chip to
  bg-base-200 + text-base-content/70.
- OfflineIndicator: `alert alert-warning rounded-none`.

Net effect: every system banner shares one alert component class family
(alert alert-error, alert alert-info, alert alert-success, alert alert-
warning, alert alert-neutral), so Business mode will render coherently
once the toggle ships. No z-index changes; Z_INDEX_SCALE tiers preserved.

Tags: refactor, ui, daisyui, layouts, navigation
Complexity: 3
Urgency: 2
Impact: user-facing
Risk: medium
Debt: paid
Epic: daisyui-migration
Semver: patch
